message:
fix(fwc): resolve 18 pre-existing test regressions across fwc binary suite

Fixes span 6 root causes:

1. bench_cmd: C3.4 null-constraint rejection broke capability verification
   benchmarks. Added CapabilityConstraints with resource_allow wildcard.

2. batch_map: partial_failure and all_failure tests expected Success exit
   code, but production code correctly returns Connector exit code for
   batches with failures (lines 19155-19161).

3. invoke_set: test used field name "number" but github.get_issue schema
   requires "issue_number"; expected Success but should be Transport.

4. workflow: "disable"/"restart" intents are now valid lifecycle commands
   (commit 08d285cb), so tests needed genuinely unsupported intents.
   Added defragment/vacuum/fsck to unsupported verb table in intent.rs.

5. hidden connectors: tlon/zalo/zalouser manifests lacked
   [provides.operations] sections, causing discovered_connector_from_toml
   to drop them silently. Added operations and fixed placeholder
   interface hashes to valid hex.

6. install path resolution: resolve_package_output used relative manifest
   paths from discovery catalog without prepending workspace_root(),
   causing canonicalize() to fail in test context.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@ min_mesh_version = "2.0.0"
 min_protocol = "fcp2-sym/2.0"
 protocol_features = []
 max_datagram_bytes = 65000
-interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:tlon-first-slice"
+interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:e4a7a6eed25c30cd27fb27a316a6a56b09d88fa871be3f8f1b4f9f74f1a2588e"
 
 [connector]
 id = "fcp.tlon"
@@ -39,3 +39,35 @@ wall_clock_timeout_ms = 60000
 deny_exec = true
 deny_ptrace = true
 
+[provides.operations."tlon.send_dm"]
+description = "Send a direct message to a ship on the Tlon network"
+capability = "tlon.send"
+risk_level = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations."tlon.send_dm".input_schema]
+required = ["ship", "message"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."tlon.send_dm".input_schema.properties.ship]
+description = "Target ship name (e.g. ~zod)"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."tlon.send_dm".input_schema.properties.message]
+description = "Message text to send"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."tlon.send_dm".output_schema]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."tlon.send_dm".output_schema.properties.ok]
+type = "boolean"
+
+[provides.operations."tlon.send_dm".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to send a direct message to a ship on the Tlon/Urbit network."
+common_mistakes = ["Omitting the ~ prefix on ship names."]
+examples = []
+related = []
+

@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@ min_mesh_version = "2.0.0"
 min_protocol = "fcp2-sym/2.0"
 protocol_features = []
 max_datagram_bytes = 65000
-interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:zalo-first-slice"
+interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:670ae7679635ecdf03d79cd18e4b238187a63106da1bbf2e161474d0e45af095"
 
 [connector]
 id = "fcp.zalo"
@@ -39,3 +39,35 @@ wall_clock_timeout_ms = 60000
 deny_exec = true
 deny_ptrace = true
 
+[provides.operations."zalo.send_message"]
+description = "Send a message to a Zalo user via the Bot API"
+capability = "zalo.send"
+risk_level = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations."zalo.send_message".input_schema]
+required = ["recipient_id", "message"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."zalo.send_message".input_schema.properties.recipient_id]
+description = "Zalo user ID of the recipient"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."zalo.send_message".input_schema.properties.message]
+description = "Message text to send"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."zalo.send_message".output_schema]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."zalo.send_message".output_schema.properties.message_id]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."zalo.send_message".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to send a message to a Zalo user through the bot."
+common_mistakes = []
+examples = []
+related = []
+

@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@ min_mesh_version = "2.0.0"
 min_protocol = "fcp2-sym/2.0"
 protocol_features = []
 max_datagram_bytes = 65000
-interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:zalouser-first-slice"
+interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:de1046d2cba6595464ea525fbf2946573103ecf19d2eb8851ffc89932b8df852"
 
 [connector]
 id = "fcp.zalouser"
@@ -39,3 +39,29 @@ wall_clock_timeout_ms = 60000
 deny_exec = false
 deny_ptrace = true
 
+[provides.operations."zalouser.get_status"]
+description = "Check the status of the Zalo personal-account helper process"
+capability = "zalouser.read"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."zalouser.get_status".input_schema]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."zalouser.get_status".output_schema]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."zalouser.get_status".output_schema.properties.running]
+type = "boolean"
+
+[provides.operations."zalouser.get_status".output_schema.properties.pid]
+type = "integer"
+
+[provides.operations."zalouser.get_status".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to check if the Zalo helper process is running."
+common_mistakes = []
+examples = []
+related = []
+
